code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true
  mut in_tok = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        let v = sign * val
        if have_prev and v < prev
          sorted = false
        end
        prev = v
        have_prev = true
        in_tok = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        in_tok = true
        sign = 1
        val = 0
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
        else if b == 43
          sign = 1
        else
          val = b - 48
        end
      else
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
